perks.title: Berserk
perks.description: For every {2} Health lost you gain an effect stack granting you {1} bonus Damage.

perks.title: Bonecrusher
perks.description: Increases Crude Damage by {0}.

perks.title: Dominating Presence
perks.description: When an enemy dies within {2}m, you gain {0} Melee Damage bonus for {1}s.

perks.title: Momentum
perks.description: For hitting {2} or more enemies you gain an effect stack granting you {0} additional Damage. Every attack that hits fewer than {2} enemies removes an effect stack. Capped at {1} stacks.

perks.title: Retribution
perks.description: Your attacks are {0} more effective in converting Temporal Health into Health.

perks.title: Massive
perks.description: Increases two-handed weapon Damage by {0}.

perks.title: Executioner’s Aim
perks.description: Increases Critical Hit Chance with two-handed melee weapons by {0}.

perks.title: Perfected Form
perks.description: Two-handed weapon attacks consume {0} less Stamina per attack.

perks.title: Deadly Finale
perks.description: Each consecutive hit increases your Damage by {0}, capped after {1} hits.

perks.title: Perfect Counter
perks.description: After a Perfect Block, your Critical Hit Chance is increased by {0} for {1}s.

perks.title: Duelist
perks.description: When only one enemy is within 10m, your melee attacks deal {0} bonus Damage.

perks.title: Executioner’s Grace
perks.description: On enemy kill, you gain an effect for {0} seconds, restoring {1} Health per tick.

perks.title: Agile
perks.description: Dash and Jump actions consume {0} less Stamina.

perks.title: Quick Strikes
perks.description: Increases one-handed weapon Damage by {0}.

perks.title: Surgical Cuts
perks.description: Increases Critical Hit Chance with one-handed melee weapons by {0}.

perks.title: Disciplined Fencer
perks.description: Perfect Blocks restore {0} of your current Passive Gun Reload progress.

perks.title: Evasive Fencer
perks.description: Perfect Dashes restore {0} of your current Passive Gun Reload progress.

perks.title: Deep Cuts
perks.description: Increases Slash Damage by {0}.

perks.title: Quick Hand
perks.description: Improves Active Reload Speed by {0}.

perks.title: Bulletstorm
perks.description: Consecutive ranged hits without missing grant a stacking {0} Damage bonus to your next shot, capped after {1} hits.

perks.title: Sniper's Focus
perks.description: While aiming, you gain {0} bonus Damage every {1}s, capped after {2} stacks.

perks.title: Extended Reach
perks.description: Shots deal {0} bonus Damage per 10m between you and the target.

perks.title: Muzzle Reach
perks.description: Shots deal {0} bonus Damage at close range (below 10m).

perks.title: Overpenetration
perks.description: Shots penetrate enemies. After penetrating enemies bullets deal {0} less damage.

perks.title: Planning Ahead
perks.description: Improves Passive Gun Reload Speed by {0}.

perks.title: Deep Impact
perks.description: Increases Pierce Damage by {0}.

perks.title: Bull's Eye
perks.description: Hitting a critical spot deals {0} bonus Damage.

perks.title: Firearm Training
perks.description: Increases Ranged Damage by {0}.

perks.title: Deadly Hunter
perks.description: Killing an enemy has a {0} chance to instantly reload your weapon.

perks.title: Flawless Defence
perks.description: Blocks consume {0} less Posture.

perks.title: Outnumbered
perks.description: When you are close to two enemies or more, you gain {0} Melee Damage bonus.

perks.title: Stout Frame
perks.description: Increases maximum Health by {0}.

perks.title: Just a Flesh Wound
perks.description: Increases melee Damage Resistance by {0}.

perks.title: Stitches and Rum
perks.description: You gain {0} increased effect from Healing.

perks.title: Too Angry to Die
perks.description: When you receive a killing blow, instantly restore {1} Health. Cooldown: {2} min.

perks.title: Marathon Runner
perks.description: Grants {0} additional Stamina.

perks.title: You Will Answer for This
perks.description: Increases Temporal Health gain when taking damage by {0}.
